name: test_copy_message_to_clipboard
description:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

        Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
        the copied content matches the actual message text.
descriptionHtml:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

    Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
    the copied content matches the actual message text.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
  Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message in your prompt that you'd like me to copy or work ...
  Expected: I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message in your prompt that you'd like me to copy or work ...
assert "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message in your prompt that you'd like me to copy or work with.\n\nCould you please provide:\nThe message you want me to copy\nAny specific context about what you'd like me to do with it (analyze it, format it, transform it, etc.)\n\nOnce you share the message, I'll assist you accordingly!" == "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message in your prompt that you'd like me to copy or work with.\nCould you please provide:\nThe message you want me to copy\nAny specific context about what you'd like me to do with it (analyze it, format it, transform it, etc.)\nOnce you share the message, I'll assist you accordingly!"
  
    I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message in your prompt that you'd like me to copy or work with.
  + 
    Could you please provide:
    The message you want me to copy
    Any specific context about what you'd like me to do with it (analyze it, format it, transform it, etc.)
  + 
    Once you share the message, I'll assist you accordingly!
statusTrace:
tests/ui/chat/test_chat_interface.py:220: in test_copy_message_to_clipboard
    assert _strip_markdown(clipboard_text) == ai_response_text.strip(), (
E   AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
E     Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message in your prompt that you'd like me to copy or work ...
E     Expected: I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message in your prompt that you'd like me to copy or work ...
E   assert "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message in your prompt that you'd like me to copy or work with.\n\nCould you please provide:\nThe message you want me to copy\nAny specific context about what you'd like me to do with it (analyze it, format it, transform it, etc.)\n\nOnce you share the message, I'll assist you accordingly!" == "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message in your prompt that you'd like me to copy or work with.\nCould you please provide:\nThe message you want me to copy\nAny specific context about what you'd like me to do with it (analyze it, format it, transform it, etc.)\nOnce you share the message, I'll assist you accordingly!"
E     
E       I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message in your prompt that you'd like me to copy or work with.
E     +
